item.title: Are Rajoo Engineers Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Rajoo Engineers Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing an 11.68% decline in net sales and an 89.35% drop in net profit, indicating significant operational challenges and a critical need for management to improve profitability and efficiency. Time: 1 seconds ago

item.title: Are CEAT Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: CEAT Ltd's latest results are strong, with a 23.34% year-on-year revenue growth and a 145.10% increase in net profit, but concerns about capital efficiency and reduced foreign institutional investor holdings suggest caution moving forward. Time: 2 seconds ago

item.title: Are Futuristic Solutions Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Futuristic Solutions Ltd's latest Q3 FY26 results show a net profit of ₹0.55 crore and significant sales growth, but the company's erratic revenue history and high valuation metrics raise concerns about sustainability and investor confidence. Overall, while the quarterly performance is an improvement, underlying operational challenges persist. Time: 7 seconds ago

item.title: Are Artson Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Artson Ltd's latest Q4 FY25 results show a net profit of ₹3.36 crores, a recovery from previous losses, but overall fiscal year performance declined with net sales down 11.70%. Despite improved margins, high debt and ongoing revenue volatility raise concerns about long-term sustainability. Time: 12 seconds ago

item.title: Are Granules India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Granules India Ltd's Q4 FY26 results are strong, with a 22.81% year-on-year revenue increase to ₹1,470.61 crores and a 32.59% rise in net profit to ₹201.57 crores, indicating robust operational performance and efficiency. However, there has been a recent adjustment in the market's valuation of the stock despite its strong financials. Time: 14 seconds ago

item.title: Are REC Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: REC Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are concerning, with a 5.02% year-on-year decline in net sales and a 21.69% drop in net profit, indicating operational pressures and challenges in maintaining profitability. The company's high leverage and declining margins raise questions about its financial sustainability moving forward. Time: 17 seconds ago

item.title: Are Consolidated Construction Consortium Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Consolidated Construction Consortium Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth of 39.20% to ₹103.20 crores, but the company reported an operating loss of ₹8.28 crores and a net loss of ₹2.00 crores, indicating significant operational challenges and risks to profitability despite the revenue increase. Time: 22 seconds ago

item.title: Are Castrol India Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Castrol India Ltd. reported strong revenue growth with net sales of ₹1,545.24 crores, but faced significant margin compression, leading to a slight decline in net profit. While the company shows robust demand and operational efficiency, ongoing profitability challenges raise concerns for future performance. Time: 25 seconds ago

item.title: Are Lakhotia Polyesters (India) Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Lakhotia Polyesters (India) Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing a 98.68% decline in net sales and an 80.30% drop in net profit, primarily supported by non-operating income. The company's severe operational challenges raise doubts about its financial viability and sustainability. Time: 28 seconds ago

item.title: Are Kalind Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Kalind Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are strong, showing a 119.42% increase in net sales to ₹33.11 crores and a 509.76% rise in net profit to ₹15.00 crores, indicating significant operational improvement. However, concerns about governance due to reduced promoter stake and lack of institutional interest suggest investors should monitor the sustainability of this growth. Time: 29 seconds ago

item.title: Are Piccadily Agro Industries Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Piccadily Agro Industries Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth with net sales up 21.41% quarter-on-quarter, but net profit declined by 6.27% due to margin compression from rising costs, indicating mixed performance overall. Investors should weigh the robust revenue against the challenges in profitability margins. Time: 32 seconds ago

item.title: Are Elpro International Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Elpro International Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are concerning, showing a net profit loss of ₹91.97 crores and a negative operating margin of 37.87%, despite a year-on-year sales increase. Investors should watch for future performance improvements, as current results indicate significant operational challenges. Time: 38 seconds ago

item.title: Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust Hits All-Time High of Rs 128.5 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its upward trajectory, Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust surged to a fresh all-time high of Rs 128.5 on 29 Apr 2026, outperforming the Sensex and its sector peers amid sustained buying interest and technical strength. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Parmeshwari Silk Mills Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 109.75
item.description: From a low of Rs 15 just a year ago, Parmeshwari Silk Mills Ltd has surged an extraordinary 509.7% to touch a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 109.75 on 29 Apr 2026, showcasing remarkable price momentum that outpaces the Sensex’s decline of 3.5% over the same period. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Kross Ltd Forms Death Cross, Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Kross Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Auto Components & Equipments sector, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum and raising concerns about sustained weakness ahead. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Goldman Sachs Infr. Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Goldman Sachs Infr., a micro-cap stock with a market capitalisation of Rs 31.71 crores, has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average (DMA) crosses below the 200-DMA. This development suggests a potential shift towards a bearish trend, signalling possible long-term weakness and trend deterioration for the stock. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Dwarikesh Sugar Industries Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 29 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is nuanced, with some indicators supporting the crossover while others suggest caution — does this signal stand firm or is it contradicted by the surrounding data? Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd Forms Death Cross Signalling Potential Bearish Trend
item.description: Indian Oil Corporation Ltd (Stock ID: 901145) has recently formed a Death Cross, a significant technical indicator where the 50-day moving average crosses below the 200-day moving average. This development signals a potential shift towards a bearish trend, reflecting a deterioration in the stock’s medium to long-term momentum despite its strong fundamentals and large-cap status. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Contil India Ltd — On a Day the Stock Fell 3.01%. What the Mixed Signals Mean
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Contil India Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 29 Apr 2026. Yet, the stock declined 3.01% on the same day, while monthly momentum indicators remain bearish. This juxtaposition of signals calls for a detailed examination of whether the golden cross is a reliable indicator or a misleading signal in this context. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Golden Cross Forms in Andhra Sugars Ltd Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Andhra Sugars Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 29 Apr 2026. Yet, the broader technical picture is nuanced, with some monthly indicators showing caution despite strong weekly momentum. This divergence invites a closer look at whether the golden cross stands as a reliable signal or a lone beacon amid mixed data. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: {{list.post_title}}
